series_metadata.series_description: Records demographic information about people who participate in Department of Health counseling programs that were tested for the HIV virus (AIDS). Includes information such as age, race, sex, locality, & other related information. (Contains no names or

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Maintain data in hard drive & on floppy disks ; maintain floppy disks at an approved records center & maintain hard drive in office area. hard drive & floppies provided a final report is completed ; Paper: Maintain in office area
